attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows, UPX compressed

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious manipulations of default accounts such as 'administrator' and 'guest'. For example 'enable' or 'disable' accounts or change the password...etc

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Windows Registry Persistence COM Search Order Hijacking
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential COM object hijacking leveraging the COM Search Order
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects execution of Net.exe, whether suspicious or benign.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Michael Haag, Mark Woan (improvements), James Pemberton / @4A616D6573 / oscd.community (improvements)

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: UPX dump on OEP (original entry point)
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: kevoreilly

packers.PEiD: UPX 2.93 [LZMA] -> Markus Oberhumer, Laszlo Molnar & John Reiser

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: Suspicious DNS request city.ip138.com - related to Misc (seen in China)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp any any -> any 53 (msg:"Suspicious DNS request city.ip138.com - related to Misc (seen in China)"; content:"|01 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00|"; depth: 10; offset: 2; content:"|04|city|05|ip138|03|com"; nocase; distance: 0; fast_pattern; reference:url,https://targetedthreats.net/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:9100595; rev:1;)

alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY ipchicken .com DNS Lookup"; dns.query; content:"ipchicken.com"; nocase; endswith; classtype:policy-violation; sid:2030138; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2020_05_08, deployment Perimeter, former_category POLICY, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2020_11_17;)
